fare_types.name: Lite
fare_types.description: Basic fare with no free checked baggage. Seat selection charged extra. Changes allowed with fee of INR 3,000. Non-refundable on cancellation.

fare_types.name: Classic
fare_types.description: Includes one free checked bag up to 15 kg. Seat selection included. Changes allowed with fee of INR 2,000. Non-refundable on cancellation.

fare_types.name: Flexi
fare_types.description: Includes one free checked bag up to 20 kg. Free seat selection. Free date change once. Cancellation refund 75 percent of base fare.
fare_types.refund_policy: Refundable: 75% of base fare on cancellation.

notes: All fares include complimentary water and snacks on flights over 2 hours.
